title: Retro Holiday '97
lyrics:
The year is '97, the snow is falling, but the mood is hot.
I'm wearing my bright colors, neon lights on the spot.
This Christmas is different, no quiet carols tonight.
We're turning up the bass, shining with all our might.

Do you remember that feeling, the smooth R&B groove?
We're bringing the classic energy, everyone start to move.
Just hold my hand tight, don't miss this chance,
Come on, baby, let's do the Christmas dance!

It's a retro holiday, the best time of the year!
Synth horns blare loud, forget all your fear.
Christmas beat drops, a perfect throwback sound,
Best party of the decade, all over town

We're sampling the hits, every hook is brand new and clean.
The choreography is sharp, the most electric scene.
Don't stand on the wall, get into the flow,
This '90s Christmas magic is ready to go!

It's a retro holiday, the best time of the year!
Synth horns blare loud, forget all your fear.
Christmas beat drops, a perfect throwback sound,
Best party of the decade, all over town!

Wait for the melody, slow down the time.
This feeling is vintage, forever intertwined.
The joy is simple, the love is true,
This holiday, all I need is you.

It's a retro holiday, the best time of the year!
Synth horns blare loud, forget all your fear.
Christmas beat drops, a perfect throwback sound,
Best party of the decade, all over town!

Yeah, the '90s are back!
Merry Christmas, everybody!

title: Warm Cocoa Duet
lyrics:
The beat is dropping hard, yeah, Christmas lights are blazing bright.
Forget the slow songs, we're taking over tonight.
I'm seeing you across the floor, my winter crush,
Can you handle this tempo, this adrenaline rush?

We're speeding past the others, no time for the breaks.
Every flash of the strobe is for the risks that one takes.
This feeling is real, not a dream, let the rhythm take control.
It’s a high-BPM story written for the soul.

Baby, 메리 크리스마스 (Merry Christmas)! This feeling is so right.
Our love is brighter than the 별빛 (starlight) tonight.

The best gift is this party, we celebrate!

title: Frozen Christmas
lyrics:
The city lights are blurred through the frozen window pane.
This velvet silence is ringing, washing over me like rain.
The calendar says Christmas, but the air is cold and empty.
Just a heavy bass line echoes the promises you sent me.

Every melody is minor, every note is bittersweet.
I walk the empty streets, retracing our last winter retreat.
The snow is falling now, a cinematic tragedy,
I only feel your ghost here, singing back to me.

This is not a merry christmas, it's a winter blue.
Heavy 808 drops, every sound reminds me of 우리 사랑.
Our hearts are frozen, a beautiful, broken display,
다시 돌아와, just to save this holiday.

I remember the warmth, the perfect harmony we found.
Now the reverb holds my voice, there's no one else around.
I search for a sign, a glimmer in the fading light.
Just one last dramatic kiss to make everything right.

The frost on the glass is thick, just like the silence between us.
I see your shadow in the corner, but I know it's a minus.
How did we lose the rhythm, the beat of our December heart?
I need a signal now, before we completely drift apart.

This is not a merry christmas, it's a winter blue.
Heavy 808 drops, every sound reminds me of 우리 사랑.
Our hearts are frozen, a beautiful, broken display,
다시 돌아와, just to save this holiday.

The strings swell up, a final plea in the air.
I'm caught in this loop, a sadness too heavy to bear.
I close my eyes and wait for the sound of your return.
나의 크리스마스 , please let the fire burn.

Save this night...
Don't let go...

I'm wearing my newest sweater, everything feels so bright.
The speakers are blasting, turn the volume to the max!
Forget the naughty list, this is a sugar rush attack!

Got my friends online, sending emojis fast.
This Christmas energy, we know it's built to last.
Ready for the dance break? The countdown starts now!
Three, two, one, 점프!

It's a Merry-Go-Round Christmas, spinning round and round!
Bubblegum lights are flashing, the sweetest 소리!
Catch the feeling, it's contagious, yeah, you're looking so cute!
우리 K-Pop holiday party is the perfect fruit!

This happy winter story is never getting old.

Wait, slow down just a second, catch your breath!
No time for drama, this joy is beyond death.

Hope this feeling lasts forever, just you and me!

title: 808 Sleigh Ride
lyrics:
The holiday countdown starts now, can you hear the rhythm call?
Snow falling outside the window, we're not waiting for Santa at all.
Lights are flashing, bass is thumping, a dance break under the disco ball.
Get ready, everyone, we're gonna give this night our all!

Baby, 메리 크리스마스! This feeling is so right.
Our love is brighter than the 별빛 (starlight) tonight. Hands up high, yeah, we're flying, don't stop the 리듬.
The best gift is this party, you and me, 'til the morning comes!
하나, 둘, 셋, 넷, drop the beat, let's go! This winter miracle is a moment we'll never let go.

I see you across the room, my 산타 베이비. Your style is so fresh, everything about you is maybe... My perfect match in this cold 겨울.
Every beat drop makes the moment go faster.
This feeling is real, it's not a dream, I'm caught in the light of your holiday gleam.
Turn the music up, yeah, make it loud, Let's shout our love to the whole crowd!

Baby, 메리 크리스마스! This feeling is so right. Our love is brighter than the 별빛 tonight.
Hands up high, yeah, we're flying, don't stop the 리듬.
The best gift is this party, you and me, 'til the morning comes!

Yo, check the tempo, this is the holiday rhythm. 비트가 터지네, like a firework in the sky.
No break, no stop, just pure adrenaline. Put your hands together for the 808 Sleigh Ride!

Wait a minute, look up at the 하늘. Snow falling slow, beneath the dazzling lights.
Even in the noise, I only hear your voice. This moment is the magic, the reason we rejoice.
[Climax Build-up - English] Ready for the final beat? Can you feel the heat? One, two, three... DROP!

Baby, 메리 크리스마스! This feeling is so right. Our love is brighter than the 별빛 tonight.
Hands up high, yeah, we're flying, don't stop the 리듬.
The best gift is this party, you and me, 'til the morning comes!

Woo! Merry Christmas, yeah!
The Sleigh Ride is over, but the party never stops! 

8-0-8!
